headline: U.S. CDC Says Will Enhance Screening And Monitoring Of Travelers Arriving From Areas Affected By Ebola Outbreaks; Will Coordinate With Airlines, Others To Manage Travelers Who May Have Already Been Exposed To Ebola; Will Enhance Contract Tracing, Hospital Readiness Nationwide

raw.headline: U.S. CDC Says Will Enhance Screening And Monitoring Of Travelers Arriving From Areas Affected By Ebola Outbreaks; Will Coordinate With Airlines, Others To Manage Travelers Who May Have Already Been Exposed To Ebola; Will Enhance Contract Tracing, Hospital Readiness Nationwide
